channel.title: Home on Morgan's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Morgan's Blog

item.title: Autonomous Robot Navigation with LiDAR-Based SLAM
item.description: A real-time SLAM system for wheeled robots navigating GPS-denied indoor environments.

item.title: Deep Learning for Scientific Text Classification
item.description: Fine-tuning transformer models to classify research papers by domain and methodology.

item.title: Climate Data Analysis and Visualization Platform
item.description: An interactive dashboard for analyzing 40 years of regional climate data.

item.title: About Me
item.description: Learn more about my background, research interests, and academic journey.

item.title: Frequently Asked Questions
item.description: Common questions about my work, research, and how to get in touch.
